semantic.role: Defines the narrative purpose and architectural role of a document within the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Describing the core narrative concepts and architectural role of the document
Listing invariants and explicitly out-of-scope topics
Providing structured metadata for both human readers and AI agents

English.purpose: This document serves as the architectural summary for a project document within the ArchSpine mirror system. It captures the narrative purpose, responsibilities, and boundaries of the document to ensure consistent understanding across human readers and AI agents.
English.context_and_audience: This summary is intended for developers, architects, and AI agents who need to understand the role and scope of a specific document in the ArchSpine system. It helps maintain alignment between narrative intent and technical implementation.
key_takeaways: The document defines its own architectural role and narrative purpose
Responsibilities and out-of-scope items are explicitly stated to prevent scope creep
The structure supports both human readability and machine parsing via JSON metadata
Localized descriptions ensure accessibility across English and Chinese-speaking audiences

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档作为 ArchSpine 镜像系统内项目文档的架构摘要，旨在捕捉文档的叙事目的、职责和边界，确保人类读者与 AI 代理之间的理解一致。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本摘要面向需要了解 ArchSpine 系统中特定文档角色与范围的开发者、架构师及 AI 代理，帮助维持叙事意图与技术实现之间的对齐。
key_takeaways: 文档定义了自身的架构角色与叙事目的
明确列出职责与范围外事项，防止范围蔓延
结构同时支持人类可读性与通过 JSON 元数据实现的机器解析
本地化描述确保面向英语与中文受众的可访问性
